CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-14-2004 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-05-2004 Continued To Jul-23-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-20-2004 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT KAM-WING YAN'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT: SUSTAINED without leave to amend; no opposition filed. Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/JLW/) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-02-2004 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Jim Winzler appearing in propria persona 957-8795, opposing defendant's demurrer

RULING:
NO APPEARANCES for defendant ON THIS MATTER. Plaintiff did not notify defendant of his intention to appear and argue. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING as amended:
DEFENDANT KAM-WING YAN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT:
1) SUSTAIN 1st Cause of Action with 20 days leave to amend to clarify whether the transaction was corporate or individual in nature;
2) SUSTAIN 2nd Cause of Action with 20 days leave to amend to clarify whether the transaction was corporate or individual in nature;
3) SUSTAIN 3rd Cause of Action with 20 days leave to amend to assert a derivative claim. Prevailing party is to prepare an order.(301/JLW/AC) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
